3273910.name: SCARY MAGIC ZOMBIE
3273910.description:
SCARY MAGIC ZOMBIE is a short first-person horror game.

The story is:

Evil scientists have created a SCARY MAGIC ZOMBIE.

You play as a secret spy, who enters the facility, and must collect information about this zombie.

But watch out! The SCARY MAGIC ZOMBIE is extremely dangerous.

Be very careful.

-

The gameplay is very simple. You walk through the facility, and use the left mouse click button to open doors and pick up documents.

You control the player camera with the mouse, and use the WASD keys to move.

The controls are:

  • WASD keys for movement

  • mouse movement for camera control

  • left mouse click to interact with game objects

  • ESCAPE key to open and close the pause menu

  • TAB key to view the current game objective

  • F key to toggle the flashlight

The game is designed for people who enjoy short, suspenseful, frightening experiences, with a highly immersive atmosphere.

Average completion time: 10-20 minutes.
